name: copilot-cli-extensions
description: Eight Copilot CLI extensions: five multi-model orchestrators; Crucible, an autonomous evidence-judged investigation runner; zerotrust-sourcecheck, a 32-role source security council with hardened runtime wrappers; and mcp-autoreload for stale MCP recovery.

scripts.test: npm run test:vitest && npm run test:crucible && node --test "zerotrust-sourcecheck/__tests__/*.test.mjs"
scripts.test:vitest: vitest run _shared/__tests__ triple-duck/__tests__ triple-plan/__tests__ triple-review/__tests__ debate/__tests__ duck-council/__tests__
scripts.test:watch: vitest _shared/__tests__ triple-duck/__tests__ triple-plan/__tests__ triple-review/__tests__ debate/__tests__ duck-council/__tests__
scripts.test:update: vitest run -u --passWithNoTests _shared/__tests__ triple-duck/__tests__ triple-plan/__tests__ triple-review/__tests__ debate/__tests__ duck-council/__tests__
